name: Marble Drink Table - Threshold™
description:
The Marble Drink Table from Threshold™ makes a stunning addition to your home. Standing on a beautiful marble-look metal base and featuring a sleek silhouette, the stand-alone table is sure to bring chic mid-century modern style to your decor. It makes an eye-catching accent standing beside a sofa or chair, and the 10-inch round surface is the perfect size for holding a drink or a book.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
